response_text:
ENTITY Client
PK client_id
ATTR client_id : integer : PK
ATTR client_name : varchar
REL WorkOrder -> Client : 1..N -> 1 : FK=client_id
ENTITY WorkOrder
PK work_order_id
ATTR work_order_id : integer : PK
ATTR client_id : integer : FK
ATTR work_order_date : date
REL WorkOrderMaterial -> WorkOrder : 1..N -> 1 : FK=work_order_id
ENTITY Material
PK material_id
ATTR material_id : integer : PK
ATTR material_name : varchar
REL WorkOrderMaterial -> Material : 1..N -> 1 : FK=material_id
ENTITY Operation
PK operation_id
ATTR operation_id : integer : PK
ATTR operation_name : varchar
REL WorkOrderMaterial -> Operation : 1..N -> 1 : FK=operation_id
ENTITY WorkOrderMaterial
PK work_order_material_id
ATTR work_order_material_id : integer : PK
ATTR work_order_id : integer : FK
ATTR material_id : integer : FK
ATTR operation_id : integer : FK
ATTR step_number : integer
ATTR scheduled_datetime : datetime
ATTR quantity : decimal
